The Pitch
3 main components to being successful and point out the contrast between how others didn’t
satisfy all three or did just a partial job
Explain how each component helps them reach their goal and restate the BENEFIT
Make sure they accept each piece of the program and that it makes sense to them
Whether you choose to lose weight with us or with someone else, just promise me that
whatever you do choose has all three of these components:
FITNESS
NUTRITION
ACCOUNTABILITY
Because if you think about it, you need all three.
Just having Fitness would be like having just a gym pass, you may go, you may not, but
either way, eventually you will fall off and you might not have lost weight to begin with right?
You’ve already experienced this I’m sure, from what you said.
Just having Nutrition would be like getting a healthy cookbook from a friend. Is it useful –
sure. Will it change your life – unlikely. Maybe you make a few recipes, or maybe you don’t
even open the book. Either way, you’re not going to keep doing it forever right?
Now when you combine these with accountability, they get much stronger. What happens
when you have a personal trainer at a gym? You definitely start coming to your sessions and
you start having good workouts (hopefully!). Now that would be an example of Fitness AND
Accountability. But you can ask plenty of people who have hired trainers, unless you
change your diet, you ain't gonna lose weight. But still, much better than just fitness alone.
Now what if you combine Nutrition AND Accountability. You get tons of stuff, weight
watchers, jenny craig, lindora and many others. And with these ones, you will definitely lose
weight. The only problem is, you guessed it, or how long? The issue with diet-only
interventions is that you lose fat AND muscle, not just fat. And we all know that muscle is the
powerhouse of your metabolism. So you NEED muscle to keep your metabolism going. So
what do you think happens when you diet or starve yourself without doing any resistance
training? You guessed it, you just set yourself up for regain in the future.
So if you are looking to lose weight for good, you need to have ALL THREE components.
Does that make sense?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

Ok, awesome.
So Fitness-wise, you have to be able to work out here with a trainer 3 days a week. Do you
think you can do that? (reference Fitness features if you need to stack value later)
Awesome. So you can do the fitness. Solid.
So Nutrition-wise (take out nutrition plan) we will sit down with you and make you your own
custom nutrition plan. This is obviously just a sample. You would have one made specifically
for you. And this is just normal food that you would find at a grocery store, nothing crazy,
we’re not Jenny Craig, so you’re not buying food from us or anything like that. Sound good?
Do you think you can follow something like this if we made it for you? Great.
Each plan also comes with its own grocery list. That way you won’t have to think about what
you need to buy at the grocery store. No more guesswork. You will be able to leave your
nutrition consultation with your grocery list in hand and go directly to the grocery store and
get exactly what you need.
Also, how much do you spend on alcohol, eating out, and groceries per week?
Mind if we save you some time and money while we’re at it (haha)?
Awesome. You spend $150. Well, with our grocery helper you are going to spend about
$50/week unless you like going to mothers market or whole foods, but if you are going to a
normal grocery store, then you should save about $100/week.
On top of that, from a time perspective, how does 2 hours per week sound to cook all your
food for the entire week? Using our food preparation guide, you will be able to cook all the
food for the week, all 21 meals, in under 2 hours for under $50. Sounds good right?
Great. And if you don’t know what to cook, we also have a cookbook with 42 recipes for the
42 days so you have some variety.
Sound like we have you covered yet?
Awesome. So with all these tools, do you think you will be able to follow this nutrition plan if
we make it for you? Awesome.
So the last part is Accountability. Because you can have the best diet and nutrition plan in
the world and the best workout program, but if you stay home and eat Hershey bars, it
doesn’t matter right? So the reason we have the success percentage that we do is that 87%
of people who take the challenge hit the goal. So take that in, 87% if people in your position
who start the program hit their goal. And the way we have such high percentages comes
from a few things…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

First, you are going to be assigned an accountability coach who you will owe 3 things each
week.
Second, you will be added to our online accountability group where people motivate and ask
questions.
Third, you will take a photo of your groceries each week and upload it to the group so that we
can make sure you are buying what you’re supposed to be buying. No frosted mini wheats!
Fourth, each week, you will weigh in and put your weight next to your name, that way we can
make sure you are losing weight at the right rate and if we need to make any adjustments to
the nutrition plan we can.
And besides that, your accountability coach will reach out each week just to say “awesome
job” or dear god, what happened this weekend haha. But hopefully the first.
And finally, you’ll check in on facebook for each workout so that we can make sure that you
are attending the sessions. And obviously get a little publicity for the gym.
So that is the program in a nutshell…
(Alex Close transition…)
SOUNDS AMAZING RIGHT? Best program of all time. Seriously though, it’s amazing and
every person who signs up for this finally learns to lose the weight and keep it off.
So, let me explain how you can get this for free...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 3 --
